## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`npx playwright test`)
- [ ] Backend builds clean (`npx tsc --noEmit`)
- [ ] Frontend builds clean (`npx vite build`)
- [ ] Version bumped in all package.json files
- [ ] Help docs updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] No secrets or hardcoded paths committed
